title: Lost Trinkets Renewed
description: Lost Trinkets adds in 70+ exceedingly rare unlockable trinkets with different useful abilities for you to play with
body: *** Lost Trinkets adds in 70+ exceedingly rare unlockable trinkets with different useful abilities for you to play with. Trinkets completely change the way you play the game by giving you over-powered skills. **How to unlock trinkets:** Trinkets are randomly unlocked when doing activities like fighting enemies and bosses, trading, mining ores, cutting trees, and farming. Each activity has their own chance of giving you a trinket, some riskier activities may reward you sooner with goods. (Check the config file to tweak the different unlock chances to your liking) **How to check enable/check your trinkets:** By default, you can access the trinket GUI by pressing the "R" key on your keyboard. *** ## Important Notice This is the 1.20+ port of Lost Trinkets, originally made by owmii for Forge 1.16.1-1.16.5. The license is LGPL and owmii has been MIA since 2021, so I decided to pick up the mod. Available on Forge/Neoforge and Fabric in 1.20+. *** ## Requirements: Forge/Neoforge: * [**Architectury API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) Fabric: * [**Architectury API**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) * [**Forge Config API Port**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-config-api-port) ***
